Contact Contact-117, title Manager
Last interaction: Critical CVE in the postgres-driver version we're pinning; upgrade path breaks the prepared-statement cache. Our SSO IdP is Okta, and the metadata URL rotated without notice. All logins failed for 8 minutes.
sections.title: Contact

sections.text:
Contact Contact-118, title VP Eng
Last interaction: Evaluation harness: 500 labeled queries, we A/B test embedding models nightly against this set. Fine-tuning Qwen3-Embedding-4B on our internal ticket corpus improved retrieval P@10 by 3.2 points.
sections.title: Contact

sections.text:
Contact Contact-119, title IC
Last interaction: Embedding drift: after the model update, existing chunks no longer match new queries well. Reindexing from scratch is the only way to change embedding models. Need a zero-downtime migration path.
sections.title: Contact

sections.text:
Contact Contact-120, title Director
Last interaction: Internal transfer policy: must be in-role 18 months unless manager approves a shorter tenure. Debrief happens within 2 hours. Use the rubric, not vibes. Flag any bias in the feedback.
sections.title: Contact

sections.text:

Last interaction: Synthetic uptime check is failing because the TLS certificate was renewed but the CA bundle wasn't updated. Error budget dashboard shows we've burned 40% of the monthly budget already; it's the 8th.

sections.text:
Contact Contact-233, title CTO
Last interaction: Debrief happens within 2 hours. Use the rubric, not vibes. Flag any bias in the feedback. Greenhouse ATS integration with Hiveloop for candidate tracking.
sections.title: Contact

sections.text:
Contact Contact-234, title Manager
Last interaction: Remote-first onboarding: 2 hours daily with a rotating engineer for the first week, then pair programming. Welcome lunch: team-dependent; remote folks get a DoorDash gift card.
sections.title: Contact

sections.text:
Contact Contact-235, title Director
Last interaction: React Query cache invalidation after org switch isn't clearing the /api/projects query. Next.js 15 App Router migration: the /settings page is still using the Pages Router data fetching.
sections.title: Contact

sections.text:
Contact Contact-236, title Director
Last interaction: Feature flag policy: use flags for any change that could break existing users; remove within 30 days. NPS dropped 3 points this quarter; top complaint is ingestion latency on Confluence.
sections.title: Contact

sections.text:
Contact Contact-237, title IC
Last interaction: EU VAT calculation is off by the rounding rule — we round per-line, Stripe rounds per-invoice. Annual plan renewal should create a draft invoice 7 days before renewal, not 3.
sections.title: Contact

sections.text:
Contact Contact-238, title CTO
Last interaction: Foreign key cascade on org_memberships is deleting audit entries — the constraint should be RESTRICT. The users_org_idx partial index is not being used by the planner on the member-list query.
sections.title: Contact

sections.text:
Contact Contact-239, title Manager
Last interaction: A leaked .env file made it to a contributor's fork on GitHub; the key has been revoked and rotated. Our SSO IdP is Okta, and the metadata URL rotated without notice. All logins failed for 8 minutes.
sections.title: Contact

sections.text:
Contact Contact-240, title Director
Last interaction: GitHub private repo docs are leaking into public search because the access_type wasn't set at ingest. Ingest pipeline is losing mini-chunks when a section is exactly at the boundary token count.
sections.title: Contact

sections.text:
Contact Contact-241, title IC
Last interaction: Master Services Agreement redline with enterprise customer: they want data-residency guarantees in EU. SOC 2 Type II audit window is July 1 through June 30; Vanta is our automation platform.
sections.title: Contact

sections.text:
Contact Contact-242, title IC
Last interaction: Evaluation harness: 500 labeled queries, we A/B test embedding models nightly against this set. Hallucination rate measured on the support-bot corpus: 4.7% with citations, 12% without.
sections.title: Contact

sections.text:
Contact Contact-243, title IC
Last interaction: Retrieval augmentation: we're pulling top-50 chunks but the LLM context window is 128k — room to spare. Hallucination rate measured on the support-bot corpus: 4.7% with citations, 12% without.
sections.title: Contact

sections.text:
Contact Contact-244, title Manager
Last interaction: We need row-level encryption for the PII columns; Postgres pgcrypto is the shortest path. Critical CVE in the postgres-driver version we're pinning; upgrade path breaks the prepared-statement cache.
sections.title: Contact

sections.text:
Contact Contact-245, title CTO
Last interaction: Launch plan for the new dashboard: beta for 2 weeks with 5 customers, then GA. Customer advisory board meeting notes: 8 customers, 2h, topics were SSO, SAML, SCIM.
sections.title: Contact

sections.text:
Contact Contact-246, title Manager
Last interaction: SLO for IngestBatch: 99% of batches under 10s. Currently at 98.6% this month. Chaos day: we want to kill 30% of replicas in staging and see if the SLO holds.
sections.title: Contact

sections.text:
Contact Contact-247, title CTO
Last interaction: The 2026-04-17 incident: BGP flap at the edge took us down for 9 minutes. Postmortem draft attached. SLO for IngestBatch: 99% of batches under 10s. Currently at 98.6% this month.
sections.title: Contact

sections.text:
Contact Contact-248, title CTO
Last interaction: React Query cache invalidation after org switch isn't clearing the /api/projects query. Tailwind's new v4 engine changed how arbitrary values are parsed; our design tokens broke.
sections.title: Contact

sections.text:
Contact Contact-249, title IC
Last interaction: Access requests go through Opal; standing access to prod is audited monthly. The internal wiki has 1400 pages; we should identify the 40 that are critical for a new joiner.
sections.title: Contact
